text: "[US House Speaker] Mike Johnson, Senator Josh Hawley and others quickly noted that Biden should resign the presidency or face removal under the 25th Amendment as he clearly is unfit to carry out his full set of duties," Ortel said.
title: Harris, First Lady on Collision Course at Democratic Convention, Paris Olympics
description: Kamala Harris and Jill Biden are on a collision course over whether and when Joe Biden may leave office, given the question of who will be the Dem 2024 candidate and who will lead the US delegation to the Olympic Games in Paris.
keywords: 2024 us election, will kamala harris become democratic nominee, who will challenge trump in 2024 election
